title: NYCU Dataverse Dataset
description: A published research dataset in the NYCU Dataverse repository, as returned by the Dataverse Native API (e.g. GET /api/datasets/{id}). Fields mirror the Dataverse v5.10.1 Dataset object.

id.description: Internal numeric database identifier for the dataset.

persistentId.description: Persistent global identifier (typically a DOI) for the dataset.

publisher.description: Publishing organization, typically the owning Dataverse collection.

publicationDate.description: Date the dataset version was published.

storageIdentifier.description: Backend storage identifier for the dataset.

fileAccessRequest.description: Whether restricted files may be requested by authenticated users.

useGenericThumbnail.description: Whether a generic placeholder thumbnail is used.

files.description: Data files belonging to the dataset.

DataFile.description: A data file within a Dataverse dataset.

restricted.description: Whether access to the file is restricted.

checksumType.description: Checksum algorithm, e.g. MD5 or SHA-256.
